# 🔀 Pull Request
 
## 📋 Description
 
> Briefly describe what this PR does and why.
 
<!-- Example: This PR adds input validation to handle invalid user inputs gracefully -->
 
---
 
## 🔗 Related Issue
 
> Link the issue this PR fixes or relates to.
 
Fixes # (issue number)
 
---
 
## 🛠️ Type of Change
 
> Put an `x` in the boxes that apply:
 
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes a broken feature)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (README, comments, etc.)
- [ ] 🎨 Code refactor (cleanup, no feature change)
- [ ] ✅ Test addition (adding missing tests)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix (fixes a vulnerability)
---
 
## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
 
> Describe how you tested your changes.
 
- [ ] Ran the game manually and tested all inputs (`s`, `w`, `g`)
- [ ] Tested edge cases (invalid input, uppercase letters, empty input)
- [ ] Tested on Python 3.x
**Test Environment:**
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS)
- Python Version: (e.g. Python 3.10)
---
 
## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
 
> Add screenshots or terminal output to show your changes in action.
 
<!-- Paste screenshots here -->
 
---
 
## ✅ Checklist
 
> Make sure all boxes are checked before submitting:
 
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have added comments where needed
- [ ] I have tested my changes thoroughly
- [ ] My changes do not break any existing functionality
- [ ] I have updated the README (if needed)
- [ ] I have linked the related issue above
---
 
## 💬 Additional Notes
 
> Anything else the reviewer should know?
 
<!-- Add any extra context, concerns, or questions here -->
